prompt: Create a photorealistic square indoor selfie-style image shot with a wide-angle smartphone camera in warm morning sunlight. In the extreme foreground on the right side, show a young adult Japanese woman with short dark brown hair, slightly messy bangs, natural makeup, soft brown eyes, and a calm neutral expression, leaning very close toward the camera so only the right half of her face, shoulder, upper torso, and bent legs are visible. She wears a white ribbed tank top and dark gray shorts. Behind her on the left, show exactly 1 domestic short-haired tabby cat standing on a wooden floor, facing the camera with alert green eyes and a serious expression, positioned like a companion or parent cat watching over her. The room is a bright apartment interior with a large window and pale curtains in the background, soft city buildings outside, a low beige cabinet on the left, warm sun patches and long shadows across the wood floor, and shallow depth of field that keeps both the woman and cat fairly sharp while the background is softly blurred. Use natural skin texture, realistic cat fur, cinematic daylight, intimate casual composition, no extra people or animals. Add a subtle semi-transparent white watermark reading Alconia in the lower-left corner.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic square indoor selfie-style image shot with a wide-angle smartphone camera in warm morning sunlight. In the extreme foreground on the right side, show a young adult Japanese woman with short dark brown hair, slightly messy bangs, natural makeup, soft brown eyes, and a calm neutral expression, leaning very close toward the camera so only the right half of her face, shoulder, upper torso, and bent legs are visible. She wears a white ribbed tank top and dark gray shorts. Behind her on the left, show exactly 1 domestic short-haired tabby cat standing on a wooden floor, facing the camera with alert green eyes and a serious expression, positioned like a companion or parent cat watching over her. The room is a bright apartment interior with a large window and pale curtains in the background, soft city buildings outside, a low beige cabinet on the left, warm sun patches and long shadows across the wood floor, and shallow depth of field that keeps both the woman and cat fairly sharp while the background is softly blurred. Use natural skin texture, realistic cat fur, cinematic daylight, intimate casual composition, no extra people or animals. Add a subtle semi-transparent white watermark reading Alconia in the lower-left corner.
promptZh: 创作一张照片级写实的方形室内自拍风格图像，使用智能手机广角镜头在温暖的清晨阳光下拍摄。在右侧的极近景处，展示一位年轻的日本女性，留着 深棕色短发，刘海略显凌乱，妆容自然，棕色双眸柔和，表情平静自然，身体极度靠近镜头，仅露出她右半边的脸庞、肩膀、上半身和弯曲的双腿。她身穿 白色罗纹背心 和 深灰色短裤。在她左后方，展示 1 只站在木地板上的短毛虎斑猫，正对着镜头，眼神警觉，表情严肃，如同陪伴者或守护她的猫咪家长。房间为明亮的公寓内景，背景有大窗户和浅色窗帘，窗外可见模糊的城市建筑，左侧有一个低矮的米色柜子，温暖的阳光斑点和长长的阴影投射在木地板上，浅景深效果使女性和猫咪保持清晰，背景则呈现柔和的虚化。使用自然的皮肤纹理、逼真的猫毛质感、电影级日光效果，构图亲密随性，画面中无其他人物或动物。在左下角添加一个微妙的半透明白色水印，文字为 Alconia。
